# circleci_project_environment_variable (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) name of the circleci project environment variable
- `project_slug` (String) project slug of the circleci project environment variable (e.g. circleci/org/project)
- `value` (String, Sensitive) value of the circleci project environment variable

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) created date of the circleci project environment variable
